item.title: PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals I’ve ever madeIngredients-Dungess Crab -Salmon Roe (optional)-Shallot-Garlic-Lemon-Parsley-Basil-Calabrian chili or chili flakes -Butter-Dry white wine-Bucatini, spaghetti, or linguini-Burrata (optional)RECIPE-Break down your crab: cutting off the sharp tips of the leps, removing the belly flap, separating the body and the top shell -Scrape out and save the tomalley (“crab mustard” -Discard mandibles and gills, remove claws -Crack the claw pieces -Boil the crab for approximately 7 minutes -Remove the crab from water, let cool -Crack open the shell and remove the crab meat, set aside-Mince shallot, garlic, and parsley-Sauté ingredients in extra virgin olive oil until translucent-Add Calabrian chili or red pepper flakes (optional) with butter-Add dry white wine, cook it down-Cook your pasta-Add al dente pasta, cooked crab, lemon juice + zest-Emulsify the ingredients with reserved pasta waterPlate and serve! Add burrata and salmon roe for extra depth #food #cibo #italian #fusion #pasta #burrata #salmon

item.title: Costa Rican Casado 🇨🇷A dish that reflects the flavors of the cou...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Costa Rican Casado 🇨🇷A dish that reflects the flavors of the country and reminds me of my family 😌 Cooked entirely with @hexclad #hexcladpartner

item.title: Bolognese sounded good 🤤 I got all of my ingredients delivered f...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Bolognese sounded good 🤤 I got all of my ingredients delivered from @gopuff in less time than it takes to drive from the east side to the west side of Los Angeles. Check out the new Gopuff Recipe Hub to get inspired while you shop. #gopuff #cooking #bolognese #easyrecipe

item.title: Buffalo Chicken Sliders using @danosseasoning — An all time crow...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Buffalo Chicken Sliders using @danosseasoning — An all time crowd-pleaser at tailgates 😌Ingredients:-Shredded chicken (rotisserie chicken works great)-Buffalo sauce-Celery-Lemon (juice)-Crumbled blue cheese-Mayonnaise-Sour Cream-Dan O’s: Original and “Cheesoning” seasoning -Butter-Slider buns#gamedayflavors #danospartner

item.title: Nasi Goreng 🇮🇩A dish I tried for the first time in college when ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Nasi Goreng 🇮🇩A dish I tried for the first time in college when I was visiting Indonesia — absolutely incredible Ingredients-Onion or shallot-Garlic-Chili pepper -Cooked rice-Soy sauce-Kecap manis (dark soy sauce)-Shrimp paste -MSGToppings:-Egg-Tomato-Cucumber-Sambal oelek (chili garlic sauce)#cooking #easyrecipes #friedrice #nasigoreng #indonesianfood

item.title: CHILAQUILES ROJOS 🌶️Ingredients-Guajillo chiles-Pasilla Ancho ch...
item.description:
View on Instagram


CHILAQUILES ROJOS 🌶️Ingredients-Guajillo chiles-Pasilla Ancho chiles -Chile de árbol (optional for more heat)-Roma tomatoes-Garlic -White onion-Broth (I used leftover beef stock I had from my French onion soup and it was honestly mind-blowingly good. Big fan. Whatever broth you prefer!) -Salt-Chicken Bouillon-Oregano-Corn tortillas (cut into triangles)-Vegetable oil (for frying)-Cotija cheese -Red onion -Cilantro-Radishes-Fried egg-Mashed refried black beans-Salsa Macha#cooking #chilaquiles #hispanicheritagemonth #recipe #mexicanfood

item.title: French Onion Soup or Soupe à l’oignon 🇫🇷This is one of the best ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


French Onion Soup or Soupe à l’oignon 🇫🇷This is one of the best things I’ve ever made. If you have time to make the stock, so worth it. Ingredients-Onions -Carrots-Celery-Parsley-Thyme-Garlic-Butter -Extra Virgin Olive oil -Beef broth (homemade or store bought)-White wine-Red wine -AP Flour -Salt and pepper-Baguette -Gruyère cheese#cooking #recipe #frenchonionsoup #fall #cozy #comfortfood #french

item.title: DEEP DISH PIZZA 🍕 INGREDIENTSDough-AP Flour-Barley Malt Flour-Dr...
item.description:
View on Instagram


DEEP DISH PIZZA 🍕 INGREDIENTSDough-AP Flour-Barley Malt Flour-Dry Active Yeast -Neutral Oil -Salt-Sugar -Room Temp WaterSauce-San Marzano tomatoes, you can also use fresh tomatoes! -Onion-Garlic-Parsley or Basil Stems (removed once sauce has cooked)-Extra Virgin Olive Oil -Calabrian peppers (optional)-SaltFillingUp to you — I used ‘nduja, mushrooms, black olives, salami-Low moisture Mozzarella -Pecorino #cooking #deepdishpizza #recipe #homemade #easyrecipes #dinner

item.title: PULPO🇪🇸 Inspired by Pulpo a la Gallega— Not a traditional prepar...
item.description:
View on Instagram


PULPO🇪🇸 Inspired by Pulpo a la Gallega— Not a traditional preparation but wanted to put my spin on it! Served with a saffron aioli Ingredients-Red onion-Garlic-Fennel -Carrots-Potatoes-Lemons-Parsley-Thyme-Rosemary-Octopus-Paprika -Red wine-Eggs (2 yolks)-Neutral oil (ie: sunflower oil)-Saffron-Salt and Pepper-Extra Virgin Olive Oil-Butter#cooking #octopus #recipe #spain #dinner #pulpo #comida

item.title: Tiramisù☕️🍫Ingredients -3 eggs -1/2 cup sugar -Pinch of salt-1 t...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Tiramisù☕️🍫Ingredients -3 eggs -1/2 cup sugar -Pinch of salt-1 teaspoon vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste-1 cup AP flour -Powdered sugar — you can blitz regular sugar in blender to get powdered sugar if you don’t have (: -7 egg yolks -160g cup sugar -445g mascarpone -1 cup heavy cream -2 cups espresso -55g sugar -3 tablespoons marsala wine or amaretto (optional)-Cocoa powder #tiramisu #dessert #baking #recipe #italian #easyrecipes
